title: achillea tanacetifolia subsp. distans
intro: Achillea tanacetifolia subsp. distans, commonly known as tansy chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Achillea tanacetifolia subsp. distans include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
